@graph.name: EV Advisors
@graph.description: EV Advisors, LLC is a nationally recognized leader in electric vehicle charging infrastructure, supporting innovators from inception through implementation across the EV ecosystem.

itemListElement.name: Pillar 1: Strategy and Planning
itemListElement.description: Comprehensive roadmaps for transportation electrification, EV charging infrastructure, clean energy, and community choice energy aggregation.

audience.name: EVSP, Utilities, CPOs, Fleet Operators, Investors

itemListElement.serviceOutput: Strategic Electrification Roadmap or Business Transition Plan

itemListElement.name: Pillar 2: Policy and Advocacy
itemListElement.serviceType: Regulatory Advocacy and Clean Energy Policy Support
itemListElement.description: Representation before state Public Service Commissions and other regulators to align charging and energy initiatives.

audience.name: Electric utilities and EV charging industry participants

itemListElement.serviceOutput: Regulatory Approvals and Regulatory Advocacy Roadmaps

itemListElement.name: Pillar 3: Utilities and Regulatory
itemListElement.serviceType: Utility Regulatory Consulting and Energy Policy Advisory
itemListElement.description: Navigating energy policy and infrastructure standards, including managed charging (V2G/DERs) and community choice aggregation.
itemListElement.serviceOutput: Regulatory Filings, Program Designs, or Approved Policy Frameworks

itemListElement.name: Pillar 4: Implementation and Compliance
itemListElement.serviceType: EV Infrastructure Operational Advisory and Compliance Management
itemListElement.description: Deployment oversight for EV infrastructure focusing on vendor vetting and NIST Handbook 44 compliance.
itemListElement.serviceOutput: Operational Reliability Framework or Handbook 44 Compliance Review
